default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and workflow for creating and optimizing articles](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jimmy has a content calendar mapped out for 2-3 months with templates for different variables (verticals, use cases, ICPs, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Plan to create 300-500 pieces of content initially and track metrics at cluster and individual article level](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Will use SEO testing tools to measure impact of content refreshes and optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Jose and Kavishka working on automating content creation based on clusters/topics](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Jose attending AI conference in Vegas in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

## Topics

### Content Calendar and Approach

  - [Jimmy built content templates with variables like verticals, use cases, ICPs to mix and match](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Plan to create 150+ articles initially and be responsive to high-performing clusters](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Will track metrics at cluster level and individual article level](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [For underperforming articles, will swap outlines, keywords, etc. from top performers](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### SEO Testing and Optimization

  - [Will use SEO testing tools like SEO testing.com to measure impact of content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Can compare search console data before/after updates to isolate impact](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Powerful for visualizing improvements to share with managers](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

### Automation and Programmatic Content

  - [Jose and Kavishka working on programmatically creating content based on clusters/topics](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Aim to automate creation of articles relevant to sales prospects](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Other Topics

  - [Jose will be at AI conference in Vegas in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Discussed Jose's robot dog used at conferences as attention grabber](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to start creating initial batch of 150+ articles](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Jose to share details on robot dog videos from past conferences](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Jose offered to help identify/resolve any content workflow bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/yxYM7-EtiM5MBHsEvumFg_DjqpCYMMEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

action_items.description: Send Jimmy access link to CMS
Review Jimmy's content calendar and provide feedback. Receive search console metrics after content is published.
Send video of robot dog performing tricks to Jimmy
